meta.title: Pang-araw-araw na laro ng salita
meta.description: Hulaan ang nakatagong salita sa 6 na pagsubok (o mas kaunti). May bagong palaisipan araw-araw!
meta.keywords: Tagalog, Filipino, palaisipan, salita, laro, online, hulaan, araw-araw

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Tagalog. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Tagalog as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Tagalog. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Tagalog. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Tagalog. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Tagalog. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Tagalog. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Tagalog. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.share_challenge_win: I got today's Wordle in {n}. Can you beat me?
text.share_challenge_lose: I didn't get today's Wordle. Can you?
text.hard_mode_position: Hard mode: {letter} must be in position {position}

help.title: Paano Maglaro
help.text_1_1_2: sa anim na pagsubok o mas kaunti.
help.text_1_2: Ang bawat hula ay dapat valid na limang titik na salita. Pindutin ang enter para isumite.
help.text_1_3: Pagkatapos hulaan, magbabago ang kulay ng mga tile para ipakita kung aling mga titik ang tama o halos tama.
help.text_2_1: nasa salita at nasa tamang posisyon!
help.text_2_2: nasa salita, pero hindi nasa tamang posisyon.
help.text_2_3: wala sa salitang sinusubukan mong hulaan.
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Kahulugan at AI art pagkatapos ng laro
ui.install_app_desc: Maglaro offline at kumuha ng app icon
ui.play_more_languages: Maglaro ng mas maraming wika para makita ang global stats mo!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Maglaro ng Wordle araw-araw na parang app
ui.no_games_yet: Wala ka pang nalalaro. Pumili ng wika para magsimula!
ui.easy_desc: Kahit anong salita ang tanggap, kahit wala sa diksyunaryo
ui.normal_desc: Ang mga hula ay dapat valid na salita mula sa diksyunaryo
ui.hard_desc: Ang mga nabunyag na pahiwatig ay dapat gamitin sa susunod na hula
ui.high_contrast_desc: Mga kulay na angkop sa colorblind
ui.future_word: Hindi pa nalaro ang salitang ito. Bumalik mamaya!
ui.daily_words_counting: araw-araw na salita at dumarami pa
ui.difficulty_locked: Hindi mababago ang kahirapan pagkatapos humula
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_languages_counting: languages and counting — more added regularly.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — and more coming soon.
